title: First agent without a provider key
description: New developers need a zero-key path to feel the AgentsKit runtime contract.

# First agent without a provider key

New developers need a zero-key path to feel the AgentsKit runtime contract.

## Audience

JavaScript/TypeScript developers evaluating AgentsKit

## Commands

```bash
npm install @agentskit/core @agentskit/runtime tsx
cp apps/docs-next/fixtures/first-agent/agent.ts ./agent.ts
npx tsx agent.ts
```

## Verified claims

- **agentskit/packages**: 25 packages (from ecosystem-claims.json)
- **agentskit/framework-bindings**: 7 framework bindings (from ecosystem-claims.json)

## Citations

- [first-agent fixture](apps/docs-next/fixtures/first-agent/agent.ts)
- [ecosystem claims ledger](ecosystem-claims.json)

## Ecosystem next steps

- [AgentsKit](https://www.agentskit.io/docs) — Build agents without gluing many libraries together.
- [AgentsKit Registry](https://registry.agentskit.io/docs) — Copy ready-made agents and own the source.
- [AgentsKit Chat](https://github.com/AgentsKit-io/agentskit-chat/tree/main/docs) — Define one agent experience and deliver it across interfaces.
- [Agents Playbook](https://playbook.agentskit.io/docs) — Make agents ship code a human would actually merge.
- [Doc Bridge](https://github.com/AgentsKit-io/doc-bridge/tree/master/docs) — Turn repository documentation into executable agent handoffs.
- [AgentsKit Code Review](https://github.com/AgentsKit-io/code-review-cli#readme) — Run deep, low-noise review with the model already in use.
- [AgentsKit OS](https://akos.agentskit.io/docs) — Run and govern agents in production.

> Draft generated by the content pipeline. Human approval required before publishing.

storyboard:
# Storyboard — First agent without a provider key

Format: 5-frame carousel / 15s silent GIF

1. **Hook** — "New developers need a zero-key path to feel the AgentsKit runtime contract."
2. **Install** — show `npm install @agentskit/core @agentskit/runtime tsx`
3. **Copy fixture** — show the agent.ts path
4. **Run** — terminal output includes the expected ready line
5. **Next step** — point to Registry / Playbook / Chat without inventing counts

Accessibility: every frame needs alt text; prefer reduced-motion static frames.
No auto-publish — storyboard is a draft for human design review.
